name: Party House
short_description: It's your friend Bab's birthday! Collect all cakes in all 4 levels to win!
detailed_description:
It's your friend Bab's birthday!
Party House is a 3D point-and-click game, where you collect all cakes, and optionally powerups.

You come visit Bab at his home, and takes you to his basement. He says he dropped all cakes!
Your task is to find all cakes and give them back to Bab, but Bab thinks you are trying to steal them...
There are 4 randomly-generated basements, and once beating them, you win!

Use powerups on the tables that do things, from becoming faster to stopping Bab from catching you!
Every level, the basement gets bigger, because Bab actively works on expanding his basement. So every year it's bigger.

Each level is randomly generated, meaning every time you play, the basement will be different!
